title: Lab: Build a Mobile Outreach Contact Card
summary: Lab: Build a Mobile Outreach Contact Card retrieves prior skills in an original changed outreach coordinator contact component scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css application methods, css type class id selectors, css box model, css display flow in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed outreach coordinator contact component artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
